name: New Balance Run Club- Bengaluru- June 2026
description:
This June, NBRC returns to Bengaluru with a Wellness Special focused on movement, recovery, and running together.
Join us on Saturday at 5:30 a.m. at Kick On Sweat On, HSR Layout, for a structured 5K speed workout designed for all levels, whether you’re building confidence with pace or working towards a stronger run.
Led by certified NBRC coaches, the morning includes a guided warm-up, a 5K speed-focused session, and a cool-down to wrap up the run.
Post-run, slow things down with a yoga session designed to help you reset, recover, and ease into the rest of your weekend.
Stay back after for refreshments and conversations with the NBRC community.
See you at the start line, Bengaluru.

address.streetAddress: ITI Layout Main Road, ITI Layout, 7th Sector, HSR Layout, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560068

name: Wesness Run2zumba Bengaluru 2026
description:
Your Morning Just Got a Major Upgrade.
This isn't your average Sunday. On 14th June, Westside Bengaluru becomes the most electric spot in the city — and you're invited.
We're talking a heart-pumping 2K run to wake you up, followed by an all-out Zumba Blast that'll have you dancing like nobody's watching (even though everyone will be). Music loud. Vibes high. Energy through the roof.
Location: Westside- Commercial Street, Bengaluru
 
Schedule:
 
6:00 AM – Reporting 
6:20 AM – Warm-up starts 
6:30 AM – 2K Run starts
7:00 AM – 2K Run ends 
7:00–7:20 AM – Water break 
7:20 AM – ZUMBA BLAST BEGINS!
7:50 AM – Refreshments Distribution
8:10 AM – Event Ends
 
What You Get:
 
* A stylish Wesness T‑shirt
* Cold Coffee and hydration
* A Zumba session that feels like a mini dance party
* Guided 2K run to start your week right
If you've been waiting for a reason to finally do something just for you — this is it.
One morning. One incredible experience. Zero regrets.
Run a little. Dance a lot. Light up Westside.
👉 Secure your spot now — before it's gone.

address.streetAddress: XJM6+388 CMJ, Prestige Site, Commercial Plaza Parking Point, Kamaraj Rd, near Commercial Street, Sivanchetti Gardens, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560042, India

name: Run and Rave at the Bay with PaceX and Good Flippping Burger
description:
We’re bringing you a one-of-a-kind 
Run & Rave experience at The Bay, Ecoworld,
 where fitness meets pure energy.
Start your morning with an electric community run, followed by a high-vibe rave with music, movement, and people who get it. And yes - we’re making it worth your sweat:
🍔 A burger on the house
🥤 + a drink to refuel and vibe
Whether you’re here for the run, the music, or the community, this is where it all comes together.
350+ runners. One insane morning.
This isn’t just a run. It’s a scene.
See you at the start line.

address.streetAddress: Eco World, 4D, Outer Ring Rd, Bellandur, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560103, India

name: Green BLR 2.0
description:
Green BLR 2.0 is Bengaluru's largest green running movement.
On 16th August 2026, 5,000 runners will come together at Cubbon park for one shared mission to plant 5,000 trees and restore the city's lost greenery.
Every registration plants one sapling. Real trees. Real soil. Real impact.
Join us across three distances — 3K, 5K, and 10K and be part of the run that gives Bengaluru its green back.

name: Breakthrough Run
description:
Breakthrough Run
Resolution started the journey. Commitment kept you showing up. Persistence carried you through. Now it’s time for your breakthrough.
The Breakthrough Run is the fourth and final event in the four-run journey that transforms intentions into habits and habits into lasting change.
Featuring distances up to the Half Marathon (21.1K), this edition allows participants to celebrate how far they have come and achieve the goals they set for themselves at the beginning of the year.
With every step, you complete the journey — and earn the beautiful composite medal that symbolises a year of intention, commitment, persistence, and breakthrough.
Because breakthroughs aren’t found in a single moment, they are built through the choices you make, one step at a time. With every step, you move closer to completing the journey - and to earning the beautiful composite medal that represents your progress through the series.
Series Finisher Reward
As part of the 4-Run Series, participants who complete all four runs will earn a special composite finisher medal - the Soaring Eagle, a symbol of consistency, strength, and commitment across the year.
Race Categories
Timed 21.1k
Timed 10k
Timed 5k
Non-timed 3k
Non-timed 1.6k
Participant Perks
The Unmatched BeAthlit Experience
Personalised Finisher Medal
Cool Runner's T-shirt
Snack Box
Professional Event Photos
Hydration stations every 800 Mtrs
Venue Details
Cubbon Park (Exact location will be updated soon)
Parking will be available near the event venue.
Event Requirements
 Open to all age groups
 Registration fees are non-refundable
 Participants must follow event rules and local regulations
 Respect the venue, volunteers, and fellow runners
